title: Camera Mounting Brackets
description:
Camera Mounting Brackets

Camera Mounting Brackets

Mounting a camera to the end of the robot arm is easy if you use a camera mounting bracket.  The brackets provide the necessary hardware to mount a camera to the end of the arm close to the end effector.

NOTE: When you mount the camera head to a moving part such as the robot arm, make sure to secure the cable properly to keep the camera head connector and the cable from all the stress and shake.  If the cable is not properly secured, it may have a cable disconnection and/or loose connection.
